info.title: GuidCli
info.description:
Jamie Nordmeyer © 2021
-l, --lowercase    If specified, the guid is created with lowercase letters
-n, --nodashes     If specified, the guid is created with no dashes
--help             Display this help screen.
--version          Display version information.

options.description: If specified, the guid is created with lowercase letters
